rows.label: tev021901_JNK0010
rows.name: Inquire[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev021901_SEL0011
rows.name: Ask Bergamot about the coffee situation.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev021901_JNK0020
rows.name: Discuss[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev021901_SEL0021
rows.name: Ask Bergamot if she has any interesting news.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev021901_SEL0031
rows.name: Ask Bergamot about Latte.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev021901_MSG0001
rows.name:
The coffee beans that are being made
at the integrated production plant have
really improved in quality lately.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev021901_MSG0002
rows.name:
Nevertheless, I'd kill to get my hands
on some real Miran-grown beans.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev021901_MSG0003
rows.name:
Doesn't the prospect of a new type
of coffee that could only be found
on this remote world excite you?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev021901_MSG0004
rows.name:
Of course, I don't know if this
planet even has an equivalent
for Earth's coffee plant.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev021901_MSG0005
rows.name:
But if they keep expanding
FrontierNet, we'll learn the
answer soon enough, right?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev021901_MSG0006
rows.name:
Anyway, establishing a new Miran-exclusive
line of products is another great reason to
get out there and install those data probes![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev021901_MSG0007
rows.name:
I'm counting on you! And if all that hard
work tires you out, you can always come
visit my shop to kick back and relax.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev021901_MSG0010
rows.name:
There's a researcher named
Sullivan who's a regular here.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev021901_MSG0011
rows.name:
Whenever she comes in, all she does
is complain about how she doesn't
have enough "samples" or something.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev021901_MSG0012
rows.name:
Anyway, I remembered how you helped
out poor Latte and was thinking maybe
you could give Sullivan a hand next?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev021901_MSG0013
rows.name:
You can find her at the integrated
production plant in the industrial
district. Drop in and hear her out sometime![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev021901_MSG0022
rows.name:
Some of our regulars have started
wagering on what Latte will break next.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev021901_MSG0023
rows.name:
It's driving me nuts. I tell them there's
nothing funny about it, but they seem
to enjoy studying her every move.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev021901_MSG0024
rows.name:
In the end, they took the money they'd
made wagering and bought me a replacement
for something Latte broke.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev021901_MSG0025
rows.name:
I really appreciated the thought, but as the
owner, I have mixed feelings about my customers
cheering accidental wanton destruction.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev021901_MSG0026
rows.name:
Now that poor Latte has her own
legion of fans, god only knows what's
going to befall this shop next.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev021901_SEL1011
rows.name: Ask Bergamot about recent developments.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev021901_MSG0027
rows.name:
I heard you helped out Sullivan!
Thank you so much. ...Kind of an
odd duck, though, isn't she?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev021901_MSG0028
rows.name:
She said something about display samples and bonus
samples and... Well, I could barely follow it.
Regardless, she left an extra sample here with me.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev021901_MSG0029
rows.name:
She said it was a something-or-other seeder? ...Or
did she mean cedar? Like, as in the tree? Geez,
I hope it won't trigger anyone's allergies.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev021901_MSG0030
rows.name:
Latte used to have terrible allergies, which really
affected the rate at which she broke stuff. But the
whole Blue Blood thing took care of that for her.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev021901_MSG0031
rows.name:
Honestly, I still haven't gotten used
to being inside an artificial body.
It just feels a bit...strange.[ST:wait ]
